EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} installed a PAK extension from a file on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} disabled a PAK extension on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted a PAK extension on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} enabled a PAK extension on host {event_src.host}
